1... Rxd1+ 2. Rxd1 Qg4 3. Ne1 ( 3. g3 Qxf3 { and checkmate on g2 is immediate }  ) Qxd1 4. Qc1 ( 4. Kf1 Bxg2+ 5. Kxg2 Qxe1 6. bxc6 bxc6 ) Qxc1 5. Bxc1 Na5 6. gxh3 Nxc4 { and white is totally bused - down the exchange and a pawn with terrible pawn structure. GAME OVER! }
